Pioneer DJ Pro DJ Link Bridge
Rationale: documented TCNet protocol over reverse-engineered Pro DJ Link
TCNet open protocol for real-time Time Code + Meta Data sharing
Node Role: Master (2) - sends TCNet Time Code packets to all Slaves
Node Role: Slave (4) - receives TCNet Metadata and Timing Packets
Node Role: Repeater (8) - send + receive TCNet Control Messages
UDP port 60001 - broadcast TCNet Time Packets
Network Participation steps (internal timer, listen, Opt-IN every 1000ms, track nodes, time sync)
Type 002 TCNet OPT-IN Packet (broadcast port 60000, size 68)
Type 003 TCNet OPT-OUT Packet (broadcast port 60000, size 28)
Type 005 TCNet Status Packet (broadcast port 60000, unicast to slaves)
Type 010 TCNet Time Sync Packet (unicast Target-Node-Port)
Type 030 TCNet Application Specific Data Packet (port 60001)
Type 128 TCNet Text Data (broadcast port 60000 / unicast)
Type 200/8 Data Packet - Beat Grid Info
Type 200/12 Data Packet - Cue Data Info
Type 200/16 Data Packet - Small Wave Form
Type 200/32 Data Packet - Big Wave Form
Type 200/150 Data Packet - Mixer Data (unicast to all slaves)
Type 204/128 File Packet - Low Res Artwork Image
Type 254 TCNet Time Packet (port 60001, high rate)
Node Options flags (1 AUTH, 2 TCNCM, 4 TCNASDP, 8 DND)
FLAME VERSIONS (per-field protocol version tagging for backwards compat)
Opt-IN usage: broadcast every 1000ms + unicast to each discovered node
Master election: highest Uptime+Timestamp among Auto Masters (Type 1)

Bottom transport/status bar spanning full width — fine tick-marks timeline, small status chips/icons, muted dark background
Color palette: deep charcoal/near-black background (#0f0d0b-ish), warm ivory text, amber/gold primary accent, secondary per-deck hue (teal, green, violet) — editorial studio dark aesthetic

nodes.label: Default Album Art (Vinyl/CD Placeholder)
nodes.description: Square dark-gray placeholder image depicting a stylized vinyl record or CD disc. Centered concentric circles with a small spindle hole in the middle, rendered in near-monochrome charcoal/black tones. Used as a fallback artwork when no track album art is available.

nodes.depicts: vinyl record or CD disc with center label ring and spindle hole
nodes.purpose: fallback/default album artwork for DJ deck UI when metadata artwork missing

nodes.label: Default Album Art (Vinyl Record Placeholder)
nodes.description: Square PNG placeholder artwork depicting a stylized vinyl record / CD disc on a near-black background. A slightly lighter dark-gray circular disc occupies the center, with a concentric inner ring and a small center spindle dot. Minimalist, monochromatic, flat/silhouette style with no text or logos.
